title: diarrhena littoralis
intro: Diarrhena littoralis, also known as Saltmarsh Millet or Salt Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, particularly in the coastal regions of eastern Canada and the United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Diarrhena littoralis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Diarrhena littoralis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support women's health and relieve symptoms associated with PMS.
